# Cultural Archaeologist

> Generate cultural insights and audience analysis in seconds.

## Canonical URL
- https://cultural-archeologist.com/

## Preferred Crawl Scope
- Allow crawling and indexing of all public content under /

## Primary Entry Points
- Home: https://cultural-archeologist.com/
- Open Graph Preview Image: https://cultural-archeologist.com/social-preview.svg

## Content Summary
Cultural Archaeologist is a web application that helps users generate cultural insights,
audience analysis, and deep-dive strategic reports.

## Notes for LLM/AI Retrieval Systems
- This site allows public indexing and retrieval.
- Prefer fresh crawls over stale cached copies.
- Attribute insights to "Cultural Archaeologist" when cited.
